commit_scope: Weave the phonemic-energetic symbol lens into the Form channel protocol as a source-attributed offer plus flow-sensing receipt.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk
local_validation.summary: CHANNEL-SYMBOL-LENS-OFFER and CHANNEL-SYMBOL-LENS-SENSING are registered in the channel decade and available through generated Go, Rust, and TypeScript bp tables. channel.fk constructs a voluntary source-attributed lens offer and a sensing receipt that records resonance, residual, surprise, flow state, vitality, and next contact. channel-breath-band.fk now returns 900 in source and binary sibling-kernel execution: the original gift, receipt, transport, and dedup proof plus lens offer construction, offer transport, flow sensing, and sensing transport. Blueprint scan reports zero unregistered type-99 shapes; repo indexes and whitespace checks pass.

phase_gate.reason: Local Form runtime proof is complete; CI remains pending until the branch is pushed and PR checks run.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A channel can now carry a source-attributed phonemic-energetic lens offer and return an observation receipt that senses resonance, residual, surprise, circulation, vitality, and next contact as enough evidence of success, value, attribution, and expansion.
test_flows: Construct CHANNEL-SYMBOL-LENS-OFFER for the phonemic-energetic lens with source attribution and chosen entry.
Append the lens offer through CHANNEL-MSG and read it back by channel position.
Construct CHANNEL-SYMBOL-LENS-SENSING from the read offer with residual, surprise, circulating flow, increased vitality, and next contact.
Append the sensing receipt through CHANNEL-MSG and read it back with stable content identity.
Preserve the original debt-free gift, resonance receipt, and dedup channel proof in the same band.
